zh-CN.name: 字母U
zh-CN.intro: 字母U是英文字母表里的第二十一个字母。它看起来像一个杯子，也像一个小马蹄。U是个很重要的字母哦！

story.title: 🫖 小U的大发现
story.body: 小U最喜欢捉迷藏啦！它悄悄躲在超市的货架上，藏在“杯子（cup）”的图片里，等着小朋友找到它。小U还跑到动物园，趴在羊驼（llama）的耳朵里，可是羊驼甩甩头，小U就滚了下来。它又钻到彩虹（rainbow）下面，变成一个小水坑（puddle），等着雨后的小鞋子踩出哗啦啦的水花。最后，小U跳进一本图画书，变成了一只独角兽（unicorn）的角，闪闪发光。小朋友翻开书，指着角大声说：“呀，是字母U！”小U开心地笑了，它终于被认出来啦！

knowledge.title: 字母U有什么特别？
knowledge.body: 字母U是五个元音字母之一，它经常在单词里发出“啊”或“呜”的声音。大写U和小写u长得有点不一样，但都像一个小容器，能装下好多有趣的东西。

en.name: U
en.intro: U is the twenty-first letter of the alphabet. It looks like a cup or a little horseshoe. U is a very special letter!

story.title: 🫖 Little U's Big Discovery
story.body: Little U loves playing hide-and-seek! It sneaks onto the supermarket shelf, hiding in the picture of a cup, waiting for a child to find it. Then Little U runs to the zoo and curls up in a llama’s ear, but the llama shakes its head and Little U tumbles down. It slips under a rainbow, turning into a puddle, waiting for tiny shoes to splash after the rain. Finally, Little U jumps into a picture book and becomes the horn of a unicorn, sparkly and bright. A child opens the book, points at the horn, and shouts, “Look, it’s the letter U!” Little U smiles, so happy to be recognized at last!

knowledge.title: What is special about the letter U?
knowledge.body: U is one of the five vowel letters. It often makes an “uh” or “oo” sound in words. Big U and little u look a bit different, but both are like little containers that hold many fun things.
